name: canshare-tnm8-female-genital-corpus-uteri-leiomyosarcoma-ct
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) female genital corpus uteri leiomyosarcoma and/or endometrial stromal sarcoma clinical T category
description: A clinical tumour stage (cT) of a corpus uteri leiomyosarcoma and/or endometrial stromal sarcoma before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
